nodes.name: cmd_impl.rs
nodes.summary: Barrel module that organizes all ctl command implementation submodules (hummock, meta, bench, scale, throttle, etc.).

nodes.name: bench.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the bench subcommand of risingwave-ctl, running Hummock storage and other micro-benchmarks against a live cluster.

nodes.name: hummock.rs
nodes.summary: Barrel module aggregating Hummock-specific ctl subcommands: list-kv, resize-cache, sst-dump, tiered-cache-tracing, and validate-version.

nodes.name: list_kv.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the list-kv ctl command that scans Hummock SST files and prints key-value pairs for debugging storage contents.

nodes.name: resize_cache.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the resize-cache ctl command to dynamically adjust Hummock block cache capacity at runtime via meta RPC.

nodes.name: sst_dump.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the sst-dump ctl command that reads and pretty-prints the contents of Hummock SST files for debugging and validation.

nodes.name: tiered_cache_tracing.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the tiered-cache-tracing ctl command to enable/disable tracing of Hummock file cache I/O operations for performance analysis.

nodes.name: validate_version.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the validate-version ctl command that checks Hummock version consistency by verifying SST file presence and data integrity.

nodes.name: connection.rs
nodes.summary: Implements meta connection management ctl commands (list/create/delete connections) for managing external system connections.

nodes.name: profile.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the profile ctl command that triggers CPU and heap profiling on a running compute node via the monitor gRPC service.

nodes.name: scale.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the scale ctl command to horizontally scale the streaming engine by adjusting actor placements across worker nodes.

nodes.name: scan.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the table-scan ctl command that directly reads a materialized view's state table for debugging without going through SQL.

nodes.name: throttle.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the throttle ctl command to limit source consumption rate on streaming sources for backpressure management.

nodes.name: common.rs
nodes.summary: Provides common utilities for ctl commands: gRPC client creation helpers for meta, compute, and monitor services.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Main ctl library entry point: defines the full CLI command structure using clap and dispatches each subcommand to its implementation module.
